title: Ninjabowtie Tweaks
description: Doing what Mojang couldn't. This modpack contains several features to enhance vanilla gameplay.
body:
**Modpack by [Ninjabowtie](https://modrinth.com/user/Ninjabowtie)**

# Welcome to Minecraft as it should be.

![Aurora Borealis using shaders in Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abc5f0f79f32e7ca354cadaeab82bfc8c3f9b864_0.webp)

This is a finely curated modpack built for performance, creativity, and progression. Whether you’re a veteran player or just starting, this offers a balanced blend of quality-of-life improvements, exciting exploration, and enhanced vanilla mechanics without straying too far from the Minecraft you love.

✅ Optimized for Stability  
⚙️ Tweakable & Expandable  
🎮 Perfect for Solo or SMP  

Explore, build, automate, and conquer — all with the seamless experience crafted by a [fellow player.](https://jmp.sh/XliGj5SV)

---

### Performance Note:
This modpack is not designed to be lightweight. Some features, like shaders, may require a higher-end PC. Since there are many mods in this mod pack, low-end PC's may suffer in performance compared to a more lightweight mod pack.

**⚙️ 144 Mods Total**

---

### Other

- [Physics Mod Pro can be downloaded here officially, for free.](https://www.patreon.com/posts/physics-mod-pro-117137252?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_fan&utm_content=web_share) Although I cannot directly add it to this modpack due to copyright issues, I highly recommend using it in this modpack.
